title: Static Delivery, HTTP Representations, URLs, Bases, and Origins
description: Pages work from a local file but break below a project subpath, directories redirect unexpectedly, fragments point nowhere, and the team confuses filesystem paths with URLs. Learners cumulatively produce versioned URL and delivery contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace a browser request through URL resolution, origin, path mapping, representation selection, cache, and response metadata.
Keep platform filesystem paths, POSIX publication paths, percent-encoded URL paths, queries, and fragments as distinct types.
Model root, project-subpath, preview, custom-domain, trailing-slash, and relative-link behavior under one explicit base URL.
